STATUTORY FINDINGS AND ORDER APPROVING PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS TRANSFERRED TO JUDGE MCBRIDE IN DEPARTMENT 220 FOR HEARING AT 9:30 A.M. ON FEBRUARY 8, 2013. A HEARING IS REQUIRED. THE PARTIES SHOULD ADDRESS WHETHER THE CIVIL PENALTY IS APPROPRIATE EVEN THOUGH THE COURT DOES NOT KNOW HOW MANY VIOLATIONS OCCURRED. THE PARTIES SHOULD ALSO ADDRESS THE BASIS FOR THE $41,899 IN LIEU OF A CIVIL PENALTY. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-17-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF APPEARANCE FILED BY DEFENDANT GNLD INTERNATIONAL LLC

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Judgment is transferred to Judge McBride in Department 220 for hearing at 9:30 a.m. on February 8, 2013. A hearing is required. The parties should address whether the civil penalty is appropriate even though the Court does not know how many violations occurred. The parties should also address the basis for the $41,899 in lieu of a civil penalty. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Hearing On Plaintiff'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Judgment.
Off Calendar Feb-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
